title: ballota nigra subsp. sericea
intro: Ballota nigra subsp. sericea, also known as Serice Ballota, is a subspecies of the Ballota nigra plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, carminative, and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues and relieving symptoms of anxiety and stress. The health benefits of Ballota nigra subsp. sericea include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, often used in traditional medicine to create teas, tinctures, or infusions for internal use.
